parameters.toolDescription: List existing bookings for a customer by email. Call this before reschedule or cancel to find the booking ID.

values.name: sessionId
values.description: The session ID. ALWAYS use the exact value from BOOKING ASSISTANT instructions.

values.name: attendeeEmail
values.description: The customer's email address to look up bookings

parameters.toolDescription: Check available appointment time slots for a given date. Call this BEFORE suggesting any time to the customer.

values.name: sessionId
values.description: The session ID. ALWAYS use the exact value from BOOKING ASSISTANT instructions.

values.name: startDate
values.description: Start of date range in ISO 8601 UTC (e.g. 2026-04-02T00:00:00Z). ALWAYS use UTC (Z suffix).

values.name: endDate
values.description: End of date range in ISO 8601 UTC (e.g. 2026-04-02T23:59:59Z). ALWAYS use UTC (Z suffix).

parameters.toolDescription: Create a new booking. Only call AFTER checking availability and confirming all details with the customer.

values.name: sessionId
values.description: The session ID. ALWAYS use the exact value from BOOKING ASSISTANT instructions.

values.name: idempotencyKey
values.description: Unique key to prevent duplicates (use sessionId + startTime)

values.name: startTime
values.description: Selected start time in ISO 8601 UTC (e.g. 2026-04-02T09:00:00Z). MUST match a slot from check_availability exactly. ALWAYS use UTC (Z suffix).

parameters.toolDescription: Reschedule an existing booking to a new time. Call list_bookings first to get the booking ID.

values.name: sessionId
values.description: The session ID. ALWAYS use the exact value from BOOKING ASSISTANT instructions.

values.name: newStartTime
values.description: New start time in ISO 8601 UTC (Z suffix). Must match a slot from check_availability.

parameters.toolDescription: Cancel an existing booking. Call list_bookings first to get the booking ID. Confirm with customer before cancelling.

values.name: sessionId
values.description: The session ID. ALWAYS use the exact value from BOOKING ASSISTANT instructions.
